## [00:00 - 01:42]

Then there's video scarcity. That's the next. And all this is is to get your viewer to watch the video now. We've already said, please watch this video until the end. You need to watch this until the end if you're going to discover these three big, big promises that I'm talking about. But you also have to watch this video now. You can't watch it tomorrow or the next day. You need to stop what you're doing and watch this video now. And what I want you to do here is use real scarcity. Don't make stuff up. Use real scarcity.
